title: Best-Execution VWAP Slippage
notes: naive/1_no_dedup and naive/4_correlated_asof_tle match the reference on the mild visible sample (which has no injected duplicate fills and is tiny). They fail on the hidden black fixture: naive 1 as WA (duplicate fills inflate volume/VWAP under the full-landmine regime), naive 4 as TLE (per-fill correlated quote scan over ~2M fills). naive 2 (dirty mid) and naive 3 (ROW_NUMBER) diverge already on the visible sample. Reference uses no LIMIT/TOP and is portable to all five engines.
